title: Star Wars: Clone Wars Volume 6: On the Fields of Battle
content:
{{Top|rwm|imp|italics=1}} {{ComicCollection |image=[[File:Cwtpb6cover.jpg]] |title=''Star Wars: Clone Wars Volume 6:
On the Fields of Battle'' |writer=[[John Ostrander]] |penciller=[[Jan Duursema]] |inker=[[Dan Parsons]] |letterer= |colorist=[[Brad Anderson]] |cover artist=[[Tomás Giorello]] |editor= |publisher=[[Dark Horse Comics]] |release date=[[July 20]], [[2005]]{{DarkHorse|url=Books/10-526/Star-Wars-Clone-Wars-Volume-6-On-the-Fields-of-Battle-TPB|text=Star Wars: Clone Wars Volume 6: On the Fields of Battle TPB}} |other date= |media type=Trade paperback |pages=168 |isbn=9781593073527 |isbn2= |timeline=[[21 BBY/Legends|21 BBY]] / [[20 BBY/Legends|20 BBY]] |series=*[[Star Wars: Clone Wars (trade paperbacks)|''Star Wars: Clone Wars'' trade paperbacks]] *''[[Star Wars: Republic]]'' |issues=65-71 |preceded by=''[[Star Wars: Clone Wars Volume 5: The Best Blades]]'' |followed by=''[[Star Wars: Clone Wars Volume 7: When They Were Brothers]]'' }} '''''Star Wars: Clone Wars Volume 6: On the Fields of Battle''''' is the sixth volume in the [[Star Wars: Clone Wars (trade paperbacks)|''Star Wars: Clone Wars'']] series of [[Star Wars comic books|trade paperbacks]]. Volume 6 collects ''[[Star Wars: Republic]]'' issues 65-71. It was published by [[Dark Horse Comics]] on [[July 20]], [[2005]]. ==Publisher's summary== '''''From the space station headquarters of the Bounty Hunters' Guild, to untamed worlds on the edge of the galaxy, the Jedi must go where the Clone Wars take them.''''' ''Mace Windu leads an elite Jedi strikeforce against an army of trained killers in a demonstration of Jedi power and resolve… Aayla Secura must confront her former Master in an effort to retrieve the plans for a weapon that has already destroyed one world… Obi-Wan Kenobi and Anakin Skywalker must join forces with a renegade Jedi to prevent a fleet of warships from falling into the hands of the enemy…'' ''On whatever field of battle the Jedi find themselves, their greatest challenge is to remain true to their teachings and to the ways of the Force!'' ==Contents== *[[Republic 65|''Republic'' 65]] *[[Republic 66|''Republic'' 66]] *[[Republic 67|''Republic'' 67]] *[[Republic 68|''Republic'' 68]] *[[Republic 69|''Republic'' 69]] *[[Republic 70|''Republic'' 70]] *[[Republic 71|''Republic'' 71]] ==Media== {{Mediacat|from=1|imagecat=Images from Star Wars: Clone Wars Volume 6: On the Fields of Battle}} ===Editions=== *{{ISBN|9781593073527}}; [[July 20]], [[2005]]; [[Dark Horse Comics]]; US paperback ===Cover gallery=== File:Cwtpb6cover.jpg|Cover File:SWPTP2-FC.jpg|Full cover art ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} ==External links== *{{DarkHorse|url=Books/10-526/Star-Wars-Clone-Wars-Volume-6-On-the-Fields-of-Battle-TPB|text=Star Wars: Clone Wars Volume 6: On the Fields of Battle TPB}} {{RepublicNav}} {{Interlang |ka=ვარსკვლავური ომები: კლონების ომები, ტომი 6: ბრძოლის ველებზე |pl=Clone Wars 6: On the Fields of Battle }} [[Category:Star Wars: Clone Wars trade paperbacks]]
